is_p_falciparum.evidence: Case of Plasmodium falciparum malaria; parasitemia and PCR confirmed P. falciparum.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Cytochrome b position 268 (Tyr268Ser) reported; Pfcytb:268 is a target marker. Also Pfdhfr mutations mentioned.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Single case report — presence/absence of Cytb 268 mutation in one traveler's isolates; no numerator/denominator frequency data.

sub_country_location.evidence: Malaria acquired in Mombasa, Kenya (sub-national town), though this is a single traveler case.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Travel to Mombasa in January 2002; well within 3-year window.

african_field_samples.evidence: Infection acquired by a nonimmune traveler from Israel; sample obtained/analyzed in Israel/Canada — an imported/traveller case, not an African field sample.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary case report with genetic sequencing.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Single case report; part of traveler surveillance but no dataset overlap concern for frequencies.

supplement.evidence: No supplementary data referenced; single case, no frequency tables.

assessment.summary: Single case report of atovaquone-proguanil-resistant P. falciparum acquired by a nonimmune Israeli traveler to Mombasa, Kenya. The recrudescent isolate carried a Pfcytb Tyr268Ser mutation. This is an imported/traveller case, not an African field-collected dataset, and it reports mutation presence in one patient rather than extractable population frequencies.
exclusion_reasons: No extractable per-locus frequency counts — single case reporting presence/absence of mutation
Imported/traveller case rather than African field/clinical sample collected in an African country
